title: Is there a way to have newly added boards automatically added to dashboard charts?
excerpt: We add new boards almost daily. A board for us equals a client. I would like the dashboard reports to automatically include these newly added boards. Is this possible? I don’t see a way to “select all” in the screen eith…

posts.author: lisamdye (Lisa Dye)
posts.cookedHtml: We add new boards almost daily. A board for us equals a client. I would like the dashboard reports to automatically include these newly added boards. Is this possible? I don’t see a way to “select all” in the screen either.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
lisamdye:

I don’t see a way to “select all” in the screen either.

@lisamdye There isn’t one because the number of boards you can include in Dashboard reports is limited by your plan. So you cannot just keep adding boards.

monday.com

monday.com pricing and plans

Starting from $8 per user per month, monday.com’s pricing has a plan for everyone.

Free: 1 board per dashboard
Standard: 3 boards per dashboard
Pro: 10 boards per dashboard
Enterprise: 25 boards per dashboard

I’ve never understood this part of Monday’s pricing. I don’t see why limits exist at all. The boards should be account-wide per dashboard.

It’s the main reason we don’t use Dashboards at all.
